test.create_query: CREATE TABLE count_gran_perf (k UInt64, v String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY k
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO count_gran_perf SELECT number, toString(number) FROM numbers(50000000)
test.query: SELECT intDiv(k, 1000000) AS bucket, count() FROM count_gran_perf GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY bucket FORMAT Null SETTINGS optimize_trivial_group_by_count_query = 1
SELECT intDiv(k, 1000000) AS bucket, count() FROM count_gran_perf GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY bucket FORMAT Null SETTINGS optimize_trivial_group_by_count_query = 0
SELECT intDiv(k, 100000) AS bucket, count() FROM count_gran_perf GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY bucket FORMAT Null SETTINGS optimize_trivial_group_by_count_query = 1
SELECT intDiv(k, 100000) AS bucket, count() FROM count_gran_perf GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY bucket FORMAT Null SETTINGS optimize_trivial_group_by_count_query = 0
